items.title: Waste Enforcement Standard Deployment Pack
items.description: Release of Waste Enforcement Standard Deployment Pack exists to make first hotspot rollout faster, safer, and more repeatable across municipalities. The release concentrates on hotspot scoring, field rollout reliability, and governance-ready deployment so the initial value proof appears quickly in councils that need visible public action.

customerKPIs.kpi: Days from deployment to first actionable case
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce time to first actionable case by making site selection, deployment, and field activation more repeatable.
Improve public-space nuisance reduction by focusing field capacity on the highest-value hotspots.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase avoided cleanup cost by improving the speed and quality of first deployments.

productBricks.change: Released repeatable hotspot scoring and deployment recommendation workflows.
Released updated field configuration for faster site activation.
Released fleet-health dashboards for deployment and relocation teams.

deliveryChannels.change: Rolled out the standard hotspot edge configuration to new deployments.
Rolled out deployment-planning support in the municipal web console.

items.title: Enforceable Case Flow
items.description: Release of Enforceable Case Flow exists to turn a larger share of qualified incidents into legally usable cases while reducing officer paperwork. The release concentrates on evidence governance, case workflow, and notice generation so councils can show not just activity, but real enforceable outcomes.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase case throughput by reducing procedural friction and evidence handling overhead.
Reduce officer handling time by automating more of the case assembly and document-generation flow.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce administrative hours per case through stronger workflow automation.
Increase collected fines by producing more complete and timely sanction packs.

productBricks.change: Released stronger chain-of-custody and case-linked evidence handling.
Released guided case workflow for validated incidents.
Released structured notice and sanction pack generation.

deliveryChannels.change: Rolled out updated evidence governance controls in the EU evidence plane.
Rolled out the guided case workflow in the municipal web console.

items.title: Coordinated Cleanup and Executive Value Proof
items.description: Release of Coordinated Cleanup and Executive Value Proof exists to connect enforcement, cleanup, and leadership reporting into one operating loop. The release concentrates on task dispatch, mobile closure, recurrence analytics, and executive dashboards so councils can prove service impact as well as enforcement impact.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce cleanup cycle time through better task context, field closure, and hotspot prioritization.
Reduce recurrence by making relocation and prevention decisions more evidence-based.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase service productivity by reducing repeat visits and fragmented coordination.
Improve renewal and expansion value proof by connecting service and enforcement economics.

productBricks.change: Released structured dispatch and service task tracking.
Released field completion and intervention-update workflow.
Released executive value dashboard connecting outcome, service, and recovery data.

deliveryChannels.change: Rolled out dispatch and recurrence views in the municipal web console.
Rolled out service and recovery data exchange for municipal systems.
